work_experience_normalized.position: Airworthiness / Planning Engineer for the CAMO Part M
work_experience_normalized.description: Responsible for maintenance of Inditex fleet and preparation of technical and airworthiness documentation. Duties include direct communication with customers, analysis of technical documentation, planning tasks, creation of work orders, supervision of scheduled maintenance, periodic edition of aircraft maintenance program (MP), revision of authority directives (AD) and service bulletins (SB), revision and edition of Minimum Equipment List (MEL), coordination of permit to fly, technical staff, preparation of aircraft for delivery/acceptance.
